title: What If You Click a Scam?
drDigitalIntro:
What if you accidentally click a scam popup?
• Don't panic — what matters is what you do next.
• Never open any file it downloaded.
• Delete the downloaded file immediately.
• Let's practice cleaning up after a scam click.

playgroundTask.goal: Clean up after accidentally clicking a scam popup

steps.say: Go to freegames.example — type it and press Enter.
Imagine you already clicked CLEAN NOW by accident and it downloaded a fake file. Close the popup with the ✕ first.
Now open the Downloads panel to see what got downloaded.
There's SystemCleaner.exe — that's the fake file. Click the trash icon next to it to delete it immediately.

drDigitalSuccess: You deleted the fake download before it could cause trouble. If you ever click a scam popup by accident: don't open the file, just delete it right away.
drDigitalHint: Open Downloads in the action bar, then click the trash icon next to SystemCleaner.exe.
